description: Institutional 13F intelligence: 8,600+ managers, holdings, peer search, sector flows.
name: com.the13f/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Free pf13f_ key from https://the13f.com/developers/. 100 calls/day, no credit card. Without it, every tool returns a structured free-signup-required response with the signup URL.
environmentVariables.name: THE13F_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL. Defaults to https://api.the13f.com. Used for local development against a running copy of the13f's gui_server.
environmentVariables.name: THE13F_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in seconds. Minimum 5.
environmentVariables.name: THE13F_MCP_TIMEOUT
